transcription.text: Greenfield Auto Repair, this is Sarah. Hi, I found you on Google. I need a head gasket replaced on my 2014 Subaru Forester. How much would that run? Head gaskets on the Forester are labor-intensive. We're looking at $2,400 to $2,800 depending on condition. Wow, seriously? The car's barely worth $8,000. That's way too much. I understand. It is a big job — about 12 hours of labor. Yeah, I think I'll just sell the car. Thanks anyway. No problem. Good luck with everything.
transcription.summary:
## Call Summary

New caller inquired about head gasket replacement for 2014 Subaru Forester. Quoted $2,400-$2,800. Customer declined due to cost vs. car value, considering selling instead.
